data.title: Hot Tomato Summer is back in Richmond, VA on July 17, 2025 with new flavors, a new city, and more mayo.
data.description: Launching on July 17 in Richmond, Virginia, Hot Tomato Summer is back for another exciting season. Duke's Mayo is set to commemorate everyone's favorite summer duo. This year promises to be even grander with bigger and bolder festivities. Catch all the action starting on July 17, 2025.

data.title: Wrangler® partners with STATE Bags for back-to-school line, targeting next-gen trailblazers.
data.description: In Greensboro, North Carolina, Wrangler® and STATE Bags have teamed up for an exciting collaboration aimed at the next wave of pioneers. This partnership comes at the perfect moment for the back-to-school period.

data.title: Divert and USCS partner to convert unsellable food & drinks into renewable energy and soil amendment.
data.description: A collaboration between Divert and USCS has been established in West Concord, Mass and Camden, N.J. The partnership aims to launch a recycling initiative converting food and beverage items into renewable energy and soil amendment. This program is anticipated to significantly reduce waste production, with an estimated diversion of 50,000 tons of materials annually. By utilizing innovative recycling techniques, the project will contribute to sustainability efforts and help limit environmental impact in the regions involved.

data.title: Fortune Brands will announce Q2 2025 financial results on July 31, 2025, with CEO Nicholas Fink leading the conference call.
data.description: Fortune Brands Innovations, Inc., a top home, security, and digital products firm trading as NYSE: FBIN, is set to announce its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Thursday, July 31, 2025. The CEO Nicholas Fink, CFO Jon Baksht, and VP of Finance will host a conference at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss the results. The company aims to enhance lives by creating safe and uplifting living environments.

data.title: Fortune Brands (NYSE: FBIN) declares $0.25 quarterly dividend per share, payable on Sep 10, 2025 to stockholders by Aug 22.
data.description: Fortune Brands Innovations, Inc. (NYSE: FBIN), a prominent home, security, and digital products company, has disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per common share on July 16, 2025. The dividend will be distributed on September 10, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of August 22, 2025. The company aims to enhance lives by converting spaces into safe havens.

data.title: One Rock Capital Partners sells majority stake in Island Energy Services to partnership between First Reserve and Fortress Investment Group.
data.description: A private equity firm, One Rock Capital Partners, has completed the sale of a majority stake in Island Energy Services, LLC to a partnership between First Reserve and funds managed by Fortress Investment Group. Island Energy Services, a company that operates an integrated import and storage business, was part of the deal. The partnership marks a significant transaction in the industry, with the specifics of the deal undisclosed. This move represents a strategic step for the involved parties in the competitive market.

data.title: Igloo introduces new customization program, allowing customers to personalize Little Playmate cooler and drinkware. Shop open at igloocoolers.com/custom.
data.description: In Katy, Texas, Igloo, The Cooler Brand, has introduced the Igloo Custom program, enabling customers to personalize the classic Little Playmate cooler and certain drinkware with text, photos, and graphics. This innovative offering allows individuals to design one-of-a-kind products that showcase their individuality. The Igloo Custom platform is accessible at igloocoolers.com/custom. This initiative marks the first time customers can personalize these items, offering a unique and exciting opportunity for personalization.

data.title: Florida International Terminal in Florida expands Mainsail TOS with Tideworks’ Traffic Control for improved safety and yard performance.
data.description: In Seattle, Florida International Terminal has enhanced its Mainsail Terminal Operating System (TOS) by incorporating Tideworks’ Traffic Control solution. This implementation aims to enhance safety measures and improve yard performance at the terminal.

data.title: Driscoll's Sweetest Batch™ Blackberries won Good Housekeeping 2025 Snack Awards for taste and quality - full list at goodhousekeeping.com/snacks2025.
data.description: In Watsonville, California, Driscoll’s revealed that its Sweetest Batch™ Blackberries have been recognized as a winner in Good Housekeeping’s 2025 Snack Awards. These blackberries stand out for their bold and luscious flavor, accompanied by a smooth, velvety texture. The painstaking process involving years of breeding selection, testing, and refinement has resulted in a multi-dimensional flavor profile. For more details on the awards, visit goodhousekeeping.com/snacks2025. The Sweetest Batch™ Blackberries are a product of detailed craftsmanship and offer a unique taste experience to consumers.

data.title: ZipRecruiter partners with Marcus Lemonis & FOX's The Fixer to aid small businesses' hiring process.
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, ZipRecruiter®, a prominent online job marketplace listed on NYSE as ZIP has joined forces with well-known business investor and entrepreneur Marcus Lemonis to become the exclusive hiring partner for FOX's latest reality show, The Fixer. Produced by the same team behind Shark Tank, this collaboration aims to address small businesses' crucial hiring obstacles. The show will debut on Friday, July XX, and will leverage ZipRecruiter's robust hiring tools along with Lemonis' extensive business acumen to assist companies in overcoming their recruitment hurdles.

data.title: NYSE pre-market update for July 17, 2025 includes celebration of Disneyland Resort's 70th anniversary with The Walt Disney Company ringing the Opening Bell.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update, featuring insights directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can access the update to gain valuable market information before the trading day commences. The update was presented by Caroline Woods on this particular day. Stay informed with the NYSE pre-market update for a competitive edge in trading.
US Weather Agency CPC Says Neutral ENSO Conditions Still Continue, With Sea Surface Temperatures Near Normal Over Most Of The Equatorial Pacific

data.title: Cintas Corp's Q4 fiscal 2025 revenue reached $2.67B, up 8% YoY; impacted by one less workday this quarter.
data.description: Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) announced its fiscal 2025 fourth-quarter results, ending on May 31, 2025. The revenue for this quarter rose to $2.67 billion, showcasing an 8.0% growth from the previous year's fourth quarter revenue of $2.47 billion. The decrease in workdays compared to the same quarter in fiscal 2024 had a negative impact, but when adjusted for the same number of workdays, the revenue saw an increase of 9.6% in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025.

data.title: Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) to report Q2 2025 results on July 24, 2025. Conference call at 10am ET. Dial (877) 407-4018 (domestic) or (201) 689-8471 (international).
data.description: Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) is set to announce its Q2 2025 financial results on July 24, 2025, before the markets open. A conference call and webcast for investors will follow at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Those interested can join the call by dialing (877) 407-4018 domestically or (201) 689-8471 internationally. Participants will need to identify themselves upon dialing in.

data.title: Marcus & Millichap, Inc. (NYSE: MMI) will report Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 7, 2025. Conference call at 10:30am ET.
data.description: In Calabasas, California, Marcus & Millichap, Inc. (NYSE: MMI), a prominent brokerage firm focusing on commercial real estate investment sales, financing, and advisory services, disclosed it will release its financial outcomes for Q2 of 2025 on August 7, 2025, before the market opens. The company will organize a webcast and conference call on the same day at 10:30 a.m. Eastern Time to analyze the results.

data.title: KB Home has announced the opening of a new community in Del Valle, Texas.
data.description: Austin-based homebuilder KB Home has recently revealed the launch of its latest community in Del Valle, Texas. This new development is a notable addition to the company's portfolio, providing prospective buyers with a range of housing options. With this expansion, KB Home aims to offer residents in the area a diverse selection of homes tailored to varying preferences and budgets. This move signifies the company's commitment to growth and innovation in the real estate sector.

data.title: Urban Air named top workplace for Gen Z by Newsweek in 2025 for empowering next-gen leaders. - Dallas, July 17, 2025
data.description: Leading the way in family entertainment centers, Urban Air Adventure Park has recently been commended for its commitment to fostering and nurturing the leaders of tomorrow. The top-ranked franchise has solidified its position as the number one choice for indoor adventure parks worldwide. A key player in youth enrichment, Urban Air Adventure Park is synonymous with innovation and quality, catering to families and youths alike. The recognition comes at a pivotal time for the company, with the acknowledgment underscoring its dedication to empowering the next generation.

data.title: Holman Logistics named Top 100 3PL for 2025 by Inbound Logistics for the 10th year. FEDERAL WAY, Wash., July 17.
data.description: For the 10th year in a row, Holman Logistics has secured a spot on the esteemed Top 100 list. Based in FEDERAL WAY, Wash., the company received this recognition on July 17, 2025. Holman Logistics, known for its excellence in third-party logistics services (3PL), was acknowledged by Inbound Logistics, a prominent industry authority. The company's consistent inclusion in the list is a testament to its reliability and success in the field. More information can be found on their website at holmanusa.com.

data.title: AirConsole partners with Atari to offer classic games in cars; Asteroids and Breakout: Recharged now on supported Volkswagen models.
data.description: AirConsole has announced a partnership with Atari, a leading entertainment brand, to bring in-car gaming to supported Volkswagen models. This move positions AirConsole as the primary platform for in-car gaming. Starting now, Volkswagen vehicles can access classic games like Asteroids and Breakout: Recharged. The collaboration will provide an enhanced entertainment experience for passengers. The news was shared on July 17, 2025, in Zurich.
